hooks.command: filepath="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if [ -n "$filepath" ] && echo "$filepath" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx)$'; then dir="$filepath"; while [ "$dir" != '/' ] && [ ! -f "$dir/tsconfig.json" ]; do dir=$(dirname "$dir"); done; if [ -f "$dir/tsconfig.json" ]; then cd "$dir" && npx tsc --noEmit --pretty 2>&1 | head -30; fi; fi
